future_rule: Any future valid fork must establish media admission independently, against a new snapshot, after explicit request, validation, decision, enforcement gate, and required future-fork artifacts.
rule: The current-zero future snapshot fork ledger remains non-media-admitting. The seal does not admit media, does not create release candidate readiness, does not issue a motion picture, does not satisfy authority, does not advance state, does not create a new snapshot, and does not open the future snapshot fork gate.
title: CINEMATICUM AUTHORITY OBJECT ADMISSION INTAKE REOPENING REQUEST FUTURE SNAPSHOT FORK LEDGER NON-MEDIA-ADMISSION SEAL LAW
